data.body: DECISION (user): MATCH BESPOKE — the workflow's Pass-2 verify must go AGENTIC when any finding is code-grounded (as bespoke run_review does via pass2_verify(agentic=grounded)), so the cutover is faithful. Implementation (consistent with ADR 0001 'execution-mode-fixed-on-prompt' — a prompt's execution_mode is FIXED, so use two prompts gated by a branch, not a dynamic mode): in gates/plan-review.yaml, branch on a 'code_grounded' boolean (a precompute/decide-precursor op emits it = any finding cites a CODEBASE_GROUNDED criterion) -> then: an AGENTIC verifier prompt step; else: the single-turn plan-review-verifier. Author/confirm an agentic verifier prompt variant. Then the B4 parity harness's verify call-mode assertion can cross-assert equality (not just bespoke-vs-expectation). Do this as part of B5 before flipping the gate.
